situation_brief: Tehran nighttime radiance has collapsed 73% from pre-war baseline, consistent with widespread power grid failure. Strait of Hormuz commercial shipping at 29 vessels/day (-79% vs pre-war baseline of 138). 3 facilities sustained strike damage, including Jubail Desal.
